description_long: This is a dark, octagonal wooden cup with a robust, angular handle attached to one side. The body of the cup is reinforced by two wide, matte black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. On one side, a prominent purple geometric emblem resembling a dodecahedron is displayed, adding a decorative and possibly thematic element. The wood grain is visibly textured, giving the cup a rustic, hand-crafted appearance, while the handle appears to be made of a matte metal or painted wood. The interior is hollow, suitable for holding liquids, and the overall design suggests durability and a medieval or fantasy-inspired aesthetic.
description: A dark, octagonal wooden cup with black metal bands, a sturdy angular handle, and a purple geometric emblem on its side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal shape, handle on the right, and a purple geometric emblem on the cup's body.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, no emblem visible, highlighting the cup's banded structure.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the purple emblem visible, showing the cup's depth and texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle or emblem visible, focusing on the cup's octagonal form and banding.
